cards.back: The specific objectives a product or service aims to achieve with the help of user experience.
The methods or techniques used to evaluate and assess user experience.
Tools or techniques used to collect data about user behavior and experience.
Quantifiable values used to measure and evaluate the success of a product or service in achieving its UX goals.
A metric that measures the percentage of users who complete a desired action, such as filling out a form or making a purchase.
